parameters.title: ={{ $json.company_name }} — Outreach Review — {{ $json.opportunity_id }}
parameters.content:
={{ '== OUTREACH REVIEW PACKET ==
Generated: ' + $json.generated_at + '
Status: DRAFT - Pending Approval
Opportunity ID: ' + $json.opportunity_id + '

== COMPANY ==
Name: ' + $json.company_name + '
Domain: ' + $json.company_domain + '
Industry: ' + ($json.company_industry || 'Unknown') + '
Summary: ' + ($json.company_summary || 'Not available') + '
Research Summary: ' + ($json.company_research_summary || '') + '
Why This Message Is Relevant: ' + ($json.why_this_message_is_relevant || '') + '

== ROLE ==
Title: ' + $json.job_title + '
Location: ' + $json.location + '
Seniority: ' + ($json.seniority || 'Unknown') + '
Skills: ' + ($json.skills || 'Not specified') + '

== CONTACT ==
Name: ' + ($json.contact_name || 'Unknown') + '
Title: ' + ($json.contact_title || 'Unknown') + '
Email: ' + ($json.contact_email || 'Unknown') + '
LinkedIn: ' + ($json.linkedin_url || 'Not found') + '
Confidence: ' + $json.confidence_score + '/100
Why This Contact: ' + ($json.why_this_contact || '') + '
Source: ' + ($json.contact_reasoning || '') + '

== EMAIL 1 - INTRODUCTORY ==
Subject: ' + $json.email_1_subject + '

' + $json.email_1_body + '

---

== EMAIL 2 - FOLLOW-UP ==
Subject: ' + $json.email_2_subject + '

' + $json.email_2_body + '

---

== EMAIL 3 - FINAL / PARTNER QUALIFICATION ==
Subject: ' + $json.email_3_subject + '

' + $json.email_3_body + '

== PERSONALIZATION NOTES ==
' + $json.personalization_notes + '

== REVIEWER NOTES ==
[ Add your notes here before approving ]

TO APPROVE: Set approval_status = "approved" in Outreach Queue tab
Opportunity ID: ' + $json.opportunity_id }}

## WF3: Outreach Draft Generation

Generates personalized outreach using LLM.

**Flow:**
1. Receive opportunity + contact from WF2 (or manual)
2. Build structured LLM prompt
3. Route to OpenAI GPT-4o or Claude (via LLM_PROVIDER env)
4. Parse JSON response
5. Write to Outreach Queue sheet
6. Update Opportunities status to draft_ready
7. Create Google Doc review packet

**Toggle LLM:**
- LLM_PROVIDER=openai → GPT-4o
- LLM_PROVIDER=anthropic → Claude

**Env vars needed:**
- LLM_PROVIDER
- OPENAI_API_KEY
- ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
- ANTHROPIC_MODEL
- GOOGLE_SHEETS_ID
- GOOGLE_DOCS_FOLDER_ID
